message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Lebensverläufe und historischer Wandel in der ehemaligen DDR (Life Courses and Social Change in the Former GDR), First Wave 1988","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6670","justification":"Panel survey of East German cohorts conducted in 1988 covering family formation, marriage histories, fertility, partnership and household composition in the GDR shortly before reunification, directly matching the topic and time frame."},{"title":"FDZ-Datenreport: Familien- und Fertilitätsverhalten in der DDR – Mikrodaten der Volkszählung 1981","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8601","justification":"Microdata from the 1981 GDR census focusing on family and fertility behaviour; includes marital status, children, and household structures, providing a core source on family life in the GDR in the early 1980s."},{"title":"Familien- und Geburtenverhalten in der DDR: Repräsentativbefragung 1988","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4717","justification":"Representative survey from 1988 on family and childbearing behaviour in the GDR, with detailed information on marriage, partnership, intended and realized fertility, and family norms during the late 1980s."},{"title":"Sozialstruktur und Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1986 – Bevölkerung, Familie, Haushalt","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4801","justification":"Survey on social structure and living conditions in the GDR in 1986; includes modules on household composition, marital status, number of children, and intra‑family division of labour, suitable for analysing family life in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Generationenbeziehungen und Familienstrukturen in der DDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4802","justification":"Dataset on intergenerational relations and family structures in the GDR, fielded 1985; covers marriage, cohabitation, kin support, and living arrangements, thus directly addressing family life in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Familie und Berufstätigkeit von Frauen in der DDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4803","justification":"Survey on family and women’s employment in the GDR in 1984; includes items on marital status, children, childcare, reconciliation of work and family, and attitudes toward marriage and family policy."},{"title":"Ehe, Familie und Partnerschaft in der DDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4804","justification":"Survey explicitly focused on marriage, family and partnership in the GDR in 1982; provides detailed indicators of marital histories, partner relations, family norms and expectations in the early 1980s."},{"title":"Familiale Lebensformen und Fertilitätsintentionen in der DDR 1989","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4718","justification":"Late‑GDR survey concentrating on family forms (marriage, cohabitation, single parenthood) and fertility intentions; captures changes in family life and marital behaviour immediately before the end of the GDR."},{"title":"Alltagsleben in der DDR 1980: Familie, Haushalt und Konsum","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4805","justification":"Survey of everyday life in the GDR around 1980 with modules on household composition, family relations, and domestic roles; useful to study the family context at the start of the decade."},{"title":"Sozialistische Lebensweise und Familienpolitik in der DDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4806","justification":"Dataset examining socialist lifestyle and family policy perceptions in the GDR in 1983; includes questions on marriage, family planning, state family benefits, and gender roles, directly relevant to family life and marriage in the 1980s GDR."}]}
